name: EPA_search_tri_facilities
description: Search EPA Toxics Release Inventory (TRI) facilities by US state (and optional city) via the EPA Envirofacts REST service. Returns regulated facilities that report toxic chemical releases: facility id/name, address, county, ZIP, EPA region, and closed status. Use for environmental-justice screening, locating industrial pollution sources, and facility lookups. No API key required.

city.description: Optional city name filter, e.g. 'Los Angeles'.

name: EPA_search_frs_facilities
description: Search the EPA Facility Registry Service (FRS) — EPA's integrated registry of regulated facility sites — by US state (and optional city) via the Envirofacts REST service. Returns facility name, standardized address, city/state, registry id, and federal/tribal flags. Broader than TRI (covers facilities across many EPA programs). No API key required.

name: EPA_get_tri_facility_chemical_releases
description: Get the per-chemical, per-year EPA Toxics Release Inventory (TRI) reporting forms submitted by ONE facility, via the EPA Envirofacts tri_reporting_form table. Given a TRI facility id (find one with EPA_search_tri_facilities), returns the actual reporting forms the facility filed: TRI chemical id, CAS chemical name (e.g. 'Lead', 'Zinc compounds'), reporting year, form type, max-amount-on-site code, production ratio, and trade-secret/federal-facility flags. Unlike the facility-search tools, this reveals WHAT a facility reports releasing each year. No API key required.

tri_facility_id.description: EPA TRI facility identifier, e.g. '15902CCKRN75BRI'. Obtain from EPA_search_tri_facilities.

limit.description: Max reporting forms to return (default 10, max 100).

oneOf.description: TRI reporting forms for one facility
